title: Our Standards
subtitle: The Christiano Vincenti Difference
description: Every property in our portfolio is held to institutional-grade standards. From the linens on the bed to the speed of our guest responses, we've codified what excellence looks like — and we deliver it consistently.

items.title: 5-Star Welcome Pack
items.description: Every guest receives a curated welcome including local snacks, water, a personalised guidebook, and premium toiletries upon arrival.

items.title: Sub-1-Hour Response
items.description: Guest messages are answered within 60 minutes during business hours, and within 2 hours overnight. Average response time: 18 minutes.

items.title: Professional Photography
items.description: Every listing features architectural-quality photography with optimal lighting, staging, and composition — refreshed annually.

items.title: Smart Pricing
items.description: AI-driven dynamic pricing adjusted daily based on demand, seasonality, local events, and competitive analysis to maximise revenue.

items.title: Hotel-Grade Linens
items.description: 300-thread-count cotton sheets, professional laundering after every checkout, with regular replacement schedules.

items.title: Deep Clean Protocol
items.description: 42-point cleaning checklist between every guest, including kitchen appliances, behind furniture, and all touch points.

items.title: Safety Compliance
items.description: Fire extinguishers, smoke detectors, carbon monoxide detectors, first aid kits, and emergency procedures in every property.

items.title: Maintenance at Cost
items.description: All maintenance is coordinated through our vetted contractor network and passed through at cost — zero markups, always.

items.title: Monthly Owner Statements
items.description: Detailed monthly reports covering revenue, occupancy, expenses, guest reviews, and market benchmarking.

items.title: Real-Time Dashboard
items.description: Access your owner dashboard 24/7 to view bookings, calendar, earnings, and upcoming maintenance.

items.title: Quarterly Strategy Review
items.description: Every quarter, we review your property's performance and recommend pricing, furnishing, or listing optimisations.

items.title: Annual Performance Report
items.description: Comprehensive yearly summary with ROI analysis, market comparison, and forward-looking revenue projections.
